case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ARSENIO A DELASIN et al

docket_entries.description: POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT DECLARATIONS OF VENUE AND REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DELASIN, ARSENIO A DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-03-2013
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
